Tournament.title: Tournament
Tournament.description: A prediction tournament between friends and family with access credentials and real match results.

accessPassword.description: Password required to view and join this tournament

adminPassword.description: Password required to admin and update real match results

results.description: Map of matchId to real outcomes ('1' | '2' | 'X' | null)

Prediction.title: Prediction
Prediction.description: A set of predictions submitted by a single participant in the tournament.

predictedResults.description: Map of matchId to predicted outcomes ('1' | '2' | 'X')

tournaments/{tournamentId}/predictions/{.description: Subcollection of predictions for each participant inside a tournament.
